definition.procedurexml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="event_trigger" deletable="false" x="31" y="45"><field name="trigger">no_ext_trigger</field><next><block type="controls_if"><value name="IF0"><block type="logic_binary_ops"><field name="OP">AND</field><value name="A"><block type="math_binary_ops"><field name="OP">EQ</field><value name="A"><block type="math_dual_ops"><field name="OP">MOD</field><value name="A"><block type="entity_potioneffectremaining"><field name="potion">CUSTOM:InoculationEffect</field><value name="entity"><block type="entity_from_deps"></block></value></block></value><value name="B"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">20</field></block></value></block></value><value name="B"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">0</field></block></value></block></value><value name="B"><block type="logic_entity_compare"><field name="entity">EntityLiving</field><value name="compareTo"><block type="entity_from_deps"></block></value></block></value></block></value><statement name="DO0"><block type="java_code"><field name="CODE">if (entity instanceof net.minecraft.world.entity.LivingEntity _livEnt) {&#10;    String[] effects = {&#10;        "spore:biled", "spore:corrosion", "spore:frostbite", "spore:ignitable", &#10;        "spore:madness", "spore:marker", "spore:mycelium_ef", "spore:starvation", &#10;        "spore:symbiosis", "spore:uneasy", &#10;        "arphex:spider_silk_touch", "arphex:splintered_sanity", "arphex:torment_spiral"&#10;    };&#10;    for (String id : effects) {&#10;        String[] parts = id.split(":");&#10;        net.minecraft.core.registries.BuiltInRegistries.MOB_EFFECT.getHolder(&#10;            net.minecraft.resources.ResourceLocation.fromNamespaceAndPath(parts[0], parts[1])&#10;        ).ifPresent(holder -> {&#10;            if (_livEnt.hasEffect(holder)) {&#10;                net.minecraft.world.effect.MobEffectInstance inst = _livEnt.getEffect(holder);&#10;                if (inst != null) {&#10;                    int currentTicks = inst.getDuration();&#10;                    int amp = inst.getAmplifier();&#10;                    &#10;                    // Subtracts 20 extra ticks. Combined with vanilla's natural decay,&#10;                    // the effect loses 40 ticks (2 seconds) total every 1.0 second.&#10;                    int newTicks = currentTicks - 20;&#10;                    &#10;                    _livEnt.removeEffect(holder);&#10;                    if (newTicks > 0) {&#10;                        _livEnt.addEffect(new net.minecraft.world.effect.MobEffectInstance(&#10;                            holder, newTicks, amp, inst.isAmbient(), inst.isVisible(), inst.showIcon()&#10;                        ));&#10;                    }&#10;                }&#10;            }&#10;        });&#10;    }&#10;}</field></block></statement></block></next></block></xml>
